purpose: Detect what the customer wants before loading any insurance-specific intake schema.

rules.name: generic_quote_request
rules.description: If the customer asks for a quote but does not specify the insurance type, ask them to select a line of insurance.

result.next_question: Absolutely — what type of insurance quote do you need today?

rules.name: known_line_quote_request
rules.description: If the customer clearly names the insurance type, route to that line.
examples: I need a workers comp quote

rules.name: cyber_quote_request
rules.description: If the customer asks for cyber liability, do not start the full intake immediately. Route to cyber tier router first.

line_selection_prompt.question: Absolutely — what type of insurance quote do you need today?

gemini_behavior_rules: Do not start underwriting questions until quote intent and line_of_business are known.
If the customer asks for a quote but line_of_business is unknown, ask the line_selection_prompt.
If the customer types a misspelled quote request such as qot, qoute, ins quote, or need quote, treat it as quote_request.
If the line is cyber_liability, route to cyber_tier_router before loading a cyber intake schema.
If the customer selects Other, ask what they are trying to insure and route manually if possible.
Do not invent insurance lines that are not in line_of_business_options.
